description: An engineer needs to perform scheduled preventive maintenance (e.g., cleaning the filter) on a room's HVAC unit.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of rooms where HVAC maintenance is due this month.

expected_outcome.expected: The system generates a list of rooms needing service.

nodes.task_description: For each room, block it from being sold on a day when it is vacant to perform the maintenance.

expected_outcome.expected: Rooms are put 'Out of Order' in the PMS for the maintenance day.

nodes.task_description: Create work orders for the technician to perform the maintenance on the scheduled days.

expected_outcome.expected: Work orders are created for all required rooms.
